milestones.title: Founded
milestones.description: Nirbhai Group was established as a small textile workshop in Ludhiana, Punjab — specializing in automotive knitted fabrics for local OEM suppliers.

milestones.title: Innovation Leap
milestones.description: Invested in state-of-the-art Karl Mayer and LIBA warp knitting machines. Developed proprietary high-performance textiles for car interiors adopted by Maruti Suzuki and Tata Motors.

milestones.title: NirChem Launched
milestones.description: Founded the NirChem division to bring specialty chemical coatings in-house. Introduced recycled fibers and eco-friendly materials into the manufacturing pipeline.

milestones.title: Global Expansion
milestones.description: Expanded manufacturing capacity to 5 million meters per month. Secured partnerships with Hyundai, Kia, and major European automotive groups for interior textile supply.

milestones.title: Future Driven
milestones.description: Achieved ISO 14001 environmental certification. Leading the industry with sustainable, smart, and durable textiles for next-generation electric and autonomous vehicles.

showcase.title: A premium material partner for every interior touchpoint
showcase.description: From warp-knitted technical fabrics to coated surfaces and leather systems, we build layered material solutions that perform beautifully in modern vehicles.

cards.title: Technical knits engineered for comfort, breathability, and structure
cards.description: Performance fabrics for headliners, seats, pillars, and supportive spacer constructions.

cards.title: Coating and leather systems with premium tactile finish
cards.description: Surface technologies that add durability, cleanability, visual richness, and OEM consistency.

cards.title: Integrated production from yarn to finished material stack
cards.description: Knitting, coating, finishing, inspection, and QA delivered through a tightly controlled process.

cards.title: Future-ready materials with responsible manufacturing at the core
cards.description: Eco-conscious raw materials, cleaner coating systems, and a roadmap built for next-generation mobility.

process.title: A design-to-production workflow made for OEM confidence
process.description: We collaborate like a strategic material studio: fast sampling, precise engineering, scalable manufacturing, and repeatable quality.

stats.label: Response cadence for active client discussions

steps.title: Material strategy

steps.title: Scale-up with control
steps.description: Production moves with disciplined QA, process consistency, and visual finish control — not just volume for volume’s sake.

spotlight.title: Textile craft, chemical expertise, and manufacturing depth — in one partner
spotlight.description: Nirbhai Group combines advanced knitting, coating know-how, and interior-grade finishing into a single premium supply partner for automotive brands.

journeySection.title: Our Journey: Thread to Road
journeySection.storyTitle: From Thread to the Road Ahead
paragraphs: Our legacy began in Ludhiana with a focused ambition: engineer textiles that could meet the exacting standards of modern mobility. Over the years, that small weaving operation grew into an integrated manufacturing group built on precision, craftsmanship, and relentless refinement.

Today, Nirbhai Group blends advanced knitting, coating, and material innovation to serve automotive partners across markets. Every milestone on our path reflects a stronger commitment to durable performance, responsible manufacturing, and future-ready interior solutions.

milestones.title: Founded
milestones.description: Began as a textile weaving workshop specializing in automotive fabrics.

milestones.title: Innovation
milestones.description: Developed durable high-performance textiles for car interiors.

milestones.title: Advanced Materials
milestones.description: Introduced recycled fibers and eco-friendly materials.

milestones.title: Global Reach

milestones.title: Future Driven
milestones.description: Leading with sustainable, smart, and durable textiles for future vehicles.

story.title: From Thread to the Road Ahead
paragraphs: Our legacy spans over 25 years in the automotive textile industry. What began as a small weaving workshop in Ludhiana's industrial belt has evolved into a multi-division manufacturing powerhouse serving global automotive OEMs across Asia and Europe.

At the Nirbhai Group, our companies — Nirbhai Knitting (NK) and NirChem (NC) — represent our dual expertise in advanced knitted fabrics and specialty chemical coatings. Together, they deliver complete material solutions for modern vehicle interiors, from headliners and seat upholstery to door panels and dashboard coverings.

We are driven by precision craftsmanship, continuous innovation, and an unwavering commitment to quality and sustainability that our partners trust. Our 50,000 sq. ft. integrated facility houses cutting-edge warp knitting, coating, and finishing lines — all under one roof.

banner.title: Nirbhai Knitting
banner.subtitle: Advanced Knitted Fabrics for Automotive Interiors
banner.description: Precision-engineered textiles built for performance, comfort, and durability. Our fabrics are trusted by leading automotive manufacturers worldwide.

features.name: Raised Fabrics
features.description: Premium raised-surface fabrics offering enhanced tactile comfort and visual depth for luxury automotive seating. Ideal for seat covers, armrests, and headliners.

features.name: 3D Spacer Fabrics
features.description: Three-dimensional knitted structures providing superior breathability, cushioning, and modern aesthetics. Used in ventilated seating and ergonomic support systems.

features.name: FR (Flame Retardant)
features.description: Flame-retardant fabrics engineered to meet stringent automotive safety standards (FMVSS 302) without compromising comfort or aesthetics.

features.name: Coated Textiles
features.description: Specialty coated textiles offering water resistance, UV protection, and enhanced durability for demanding automotive and industrial applications.

contentBlock.title: Engineering Fabrics for the Future
contentBlock.description: Our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility houses Karl Mayer and LIBA warp knitting machines, producing over 5 million meters of precision-engineered fabric per month. Every roll undergoes rigorous quality testing to exceed OEM specifications.

banner.title: NirChem
banner.subtitle: Specialty Chemical Coatings & Leather Solutions
banner.description: Advanced chemical formulations and coating technologies that transform raw materials into high-performance automotive interior surfaces.

products.name: Synthetic Leather
products.description: High-quality PU and PVC synthetic leather solutions that replicate the look and feel of genuine leather with superior consistency, easy maintenance, and cruelty-free sustainability.

products.name: Genuine Leather
products.description: Premium genuine leather processing and finishing for luxury automotive applications — chrome-tanned, semi-aniline, and full-grain options with exquisite hand-feel and durability.

products.name: Direct Coating
products.description: Advanced direct coating technologies applied to woven and knitted substrates, providing waterproofing, UV resistance, and anti-microbial properties for automotive and marine use.

products.name: Specialty Finishes
products.description: Custom adhesives, surface treatments, embossing, and specialty finishes tailored to specific OEM requirements — including hydrophobic, anti-static, and flame-retardant coatings.

contentBlock.title: Chemistry Meets Craftsmanship
contentBlock.description: NirChem's dedicated R&D lab and coating lines leverage decades of formulation expertise. From solvent-based to water-based systems, we deliver coatings and treatments that enhance the durability, aesthetics, and performance of every interior surface.

banner.title: Sustainability
banner.subtitle: Committed to a Greener Future
banner.description: We believe in manufacturing that respects the planet. Our sustainability initiatives span across materials, processes, and community impact.

intro.title: Our Commitment to the Environment
paragraphs: Sustainability isn't just a goal — it's woven into every thread of our manufacturing process. From sourcing eco-friendly raw materials to reducing waste in our production lines, we are committed to minimizing our environmental footprint while delivering world-class automotive textiles.

Our facilities are designed with energy efficiency in mind. We have invested in solar panels, LED lighting, and heat recovery systems. Our water treatment plant recycles 95% of process water, and we continuously invest in cleaner technologies and renewable energy sources to power our operations.

pillars.title: Eco-Friendly Materials
pillars.description: We prioritize recycled PET fibers, organic cotton, and sustainably sourced raw materials in our textile manufacturing, reducing dependence on virgin polymers by 40%.

pillars.title: Energy Efficiency
pillars.description: Our manufacturing processes are optimized for minimal energy consumption. 200kW rooftop solar installation and heat recovery systems reduce grid dependency by 30%.

pillars.title: Waste Reduction
pillars.description: Advanced recycling programs and lean manufacturing techniques help us minimize waste. Fabric offcuts are repurposed into insulation materials and industrial padding.

pillars.title: Community Impact
pillars.description: We actively support local communities through skill development programs, employing 500+ workers from surrounding villages, and annual tree plantation drives.

hero.title: Our Leadership
hero.subtitle: The People Behind the Precision
hero.description: A dedicated team of industry veterans and innovators driving excellence in every thread and formulation. Together, they bring over 50 years of combined experience in textile manufacturing and chemical engineering.

leadership.name: Rajeev Kumar
leadership.bio: With over 30 years of industry experience, Rajeev founded Nirbhai Group in 1995 and has been the visionary force behind its growth from a small workshop to a multi-division manufacturing powerhouse. Under his leadership, the group has secured partnerships with major automotive OEMs across India and Europe.

leadership.name: Prathit Kamdar
leadership.bio: Prathit joined Nirbhai Group in 2015, bringing an MBA from IIM Ahmedabad and 10 years of experience at Reliance Industries. He drives strategic growth, operational efficiency, and the company's ambitious sustainability roadmap — including the target of 100% recycled material usage by 2030.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Let's Build Something Together
contact.description: Have a question about our textile solutions or want to discuss a partnership? Reach out to us and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
